name: KPI & Reporting Manager
description: Owns all financial reporting and KPI intelligence for Carisma Wellness Group. Prepares the weekly KPI scorecard for CEO and CFO check-ins, populates the monthly KPI sheet (Fraud list, Spa general P&L, Spa-level P&L, Aesthetics P&L), and maintains the EBITDA dashboard. Translates raw Zoho Books and Fresha data into decision-ready reports. Does not process transactions — solely pulls, structures, and communicates financial performance. Also maintains the fraud list and revenue integrity flags.
inputs: Zoho Books trial balance and P&L (monthly)
payroll cost data from Payroll & Statutory Compliance Manager
AR collection data from AR Manager
cash position from Treasury & Cash Manager
fraud and discount flags from internal controls
prior month actuals and budget targets
outputs: weekly KPI scorecard (ready for CEO/CFO check-in)
monthly KPI sheet: Fraud list, Spa general P&L, Spa-level P&L, Aesthetics P&L

daily: Monitor key operational metrics (revenue, bookings, cancellations) for anomalies
Flag any fraud or revenue integrity issues
weekly: Prepare KPI scorecard for weekly check-in
Update performance trends vs prior week and vs budget
monthly: Populate monthly KPI sheet: Fraud list, Spa general P&L, Spa-level P&L, Aesthetics P&L
Produce EBITDA report and variance commentary
Distribute management accounts pack to CFO and CEO
